title: Reincarnated as an Egg
overview: Being reborn as a dragon sounds like winning the isekai lottery, but there's a catch: our intrepid hero starts out as a helpless—not to mention delicious—egg.

title: Hated for Being Brave
overview: A baby dragon is no match for this opponent. The only option is to run, but the humans can't just be left to a gruesome fate.

title: An Unexpectedly Pleasant Evolution
overview: Obtaining the Human Transformation skill means seeing Myria again. But committing to the required evolutionary path results in dark skills instead of the expected one.

title: The Pot Turned Out to Be a Tortoise
overview: The Young Plague Dragon gathers vegetables, seasonings, and even tableware to enjoy a delicious meal.

title: The Toxic Woman Turned Out to Be Wife Material
overview: The black lizard is a dangerous opponent, and the plague dragon must capture her before it's too late.

title: I Became Human and Got My Butt Kicked
overview: The plague dragon gains the Human Transformation skill, and just in time: two adventurers have discovered the dragon's cave. But the skill may not be as helpful as one hopes.

title: I Went on a Date and Got Ditched
overview: While the plague dragon adjusts to being a clan boss, Myria ventures into the forest alone.

title: I Realized I Had No Name
overview: While the plague dragon considers a new evolution path, Myria asks an important question: Do you have a name?

title: I Went to the Village and Found Carnage
overview: Illusia and Myria must save the village.

title: I Evolved Into an Evil Dragon
overview: Illusia must evolve to defeat the Rock Dragon, but the power comes with a heavy price.

title: I Caught Sight of the Mastermind
overview: A plague dragon is a dire threat to humanity. Branded as an enemy, Illusia prepares to leave the forest for good, but not before protecting the village one last time.

title: I Looked to the Sky and Saw a Hero
overview: As the battle escalates, Illusia finally realizes why the slime is so dangerous. An important decision lies ahead.
